titleStmt.title: SII 19.312: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 312. (A.R. No. 112 of 1926.) TIRUVIḶAKKUḌI, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, MAṆAVĀḶĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The details of date correspond to A.D. 980, February 16, Monday in the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa. This records an endowment of two plots of land after purchase, one for maintaining a perpetual lamp, and the other for the daily supply of 15 pots of water from the river Kāvēri for the sacred bath of the god in the temple of Tiruvēḻvikkuḍi-Mahādēva, by Ayyaṉ Māraśīṅgaṉ alias Vīraśēkhara-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Guṇamalappāḍi in Nallāṟṟūr-nāḍu, who got the lands exempt from taxes by payment of a lump sum to the Perunguṟi-perumakkaḷ (assembly) of Viḍēlviḍugudēvachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—. svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 2Āvatu vaṭakarai
kuṟukkaiṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam viṭelviṭukudevacaturvedimaṅkala
ttup peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom Ivvāṇṭu kumbhanāyiṟṟut
tiṅkaṭkiḻamai peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāṉṟu I
vūr maṇṭapattey peruṅkuṟi Iruṉtu nallāṟṟu
rnāṭṭu kuṇamalappāṭik kuṇamalappāṭiyuṭaiyā
ṉ Ayyaṉ māraciṅkaṉāṉa viracekara muve
ntaveḷāṉ tāṉ poṉ kuṭuttu vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam Iv
vūr mi melaip paruttivāykkāliṉ miyciṟakil Ivaṉ kuvaṇṭur
gotamaccaturvedipakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya ṉilam Iraṇṭumā tiruve
ḻvikkuṭi mahādevarkku candrāditavat tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟum Ivaṉe parameśva
ravāykkāliṉ miyciṟakiṟ pākaḷūr tiruvaraṅkakramavittaṉpakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya ṉilam mākāṇiyum I
devarkkut tirumañcuṇamaḷikkum patiṉaiñkalam kāveriyiṉiṉṟu koṭuvantaṭṭakkaṭavatāka kuṭutta ṉila
mmāka ṉilam muṉṟu mākkāṇiyālum vanta Iṟaikku meppeṟpaṭṭataṟkum candrādittavat Iṟaiyiliyā
ka Ivaṉpakkal dravyaṅ koṇṭu Iṟaiyiḻicci Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭuttom sabhaiyom Itu paṉ
māheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.312 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
